summary.en: Choose item counts for a two-constraint packing instance and maximize total treasure value.
summary.zh: 为双约束装箱实例选择物品数量，并最大化宝物总价值。

private_assets.asset_note: ZIP overlay containing the private official run manifest at private-benchmark/runs.json. The manifest carries hidden Frontier-CS-derived JSON cases and baseline/best scoring metadata.
